title: dactylorhiza × vallis-peenae
intro: Dactylorhiza × vallis-peenae, a hybrid orchid, is a cross between Dactylorhiza fuchsii and Dactylorhiza maculata. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × vallis-peenae include its ability to help with wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
